(forall(x0: Real) { not preserves_add[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real) or forall(x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0 + x1) = Complex.from_real(x0) + Complex.from_real(x1) } = true })

let w2: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(w0 + w2) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(w2) }

p.c: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[Real, Real, Complex](Complex.from_real, ring_as_module[Real], complex_real_module)

let w2: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(w0, w2)) != complex_real_module.smul(w0, Complex.from_real(w2)) }
